title: Enneahcube local alphabet
objective: Define local admissible state alphabet; do not mistake it for the whole cosmology.

title: Branch ontology
objective: Define branch histories as first-class cosmological objects.

title: Observer commitment and memory
objective: Define observation as branch-relative memory; not necessarily collapse.

title: Decoherence and branch separation
objective: Make leaf branches world-like through separation/orthogonality/decoherence.

title: Branch-to-spacetime bridge
objective: Map branch ensembles; not only finite states; to effective physical quantities.

title: Emergent geometry and effective physics
objective: Derive metric; fields; and dynamical equations or a coherent alternative.

title: Cosmological observables
objective: Produce measurable predictions from the fixed branch-centered ASH theory.
